name: Ultimate Divine-Beast
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>絶</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぜっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>対</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>なる<ruby lang="jp"><rb>幻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can discard 1 Spell/Trap, then target 1 Divine-Beast monster in your GY; Special Summon it in Defense Position, then change the attack target to it. During the End Phase, if you control a Divine-Beast monster: You can destroy all face-up cards your opponent controls that activated their effects on the field this turn. You can only use each effect of "Ultimate Divine-Beast" once per turn.
eff: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can discard 1 Spell/Trap, then target 1 Divine-Beast monster in your GY; Special Summon it in Defense Position, then change the attack target to it. During the End Phase, if you control a Divine-Beast monster: You can destroy all face-up cards your opponent controls that activated their effects on the field this turn. You can only use each effect of "Ultimate Divine-Beast" once per turn.

sets.set: Egyptian God Deck: Slifer the Sky Dragon

mst: Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-up Spell Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-up Trap Cards
